section_name: Speed of Vehicle in Park in County Bordering Gulf of Mexico
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person drives a vehicle at a speed greater than 30 miles per hour within the boundaries of a county park located in a county that borders on the Gulf of Mexico, other than on a beach as that term is defined by Section 61.012 (Definition) , Natural Resources Code, in the park.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $1 or more than $200.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 750. Misc. Provisions
##### § 750.002 — Speed of Vehicle in Park in County Bordering Gulf of Mexico

(a) A person commits an offense if the person drives a vehicle at a speed greater than 30 miles per hour within the boundaries of a county park located in a county that borders on the Gulf of Mexico, other than on a beach as that term is defined by Section 61.012 (Definition) , Natural Resources Code, in the park.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $1 or more than $200.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person drives a vehicle at a speed greater than 30 miles per hour within the boundaries of a county park located in a county that borders on the Gulf of Mexico, other than on a beach as that term is defined by Section 61.012 (Definition) , Natural Resources Code, in the park.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $1 or more than $200.
